name: Ambush
description: Deals double damage on the first attack.

name: Capacitor
description: When you lose Barrier, gain Charge equal to Barrier lost, up to N per trigger.

name: Contagion
description: When you are hit (HP reduced), your attacker gains N Poison.

name: Discharge
description: When you are hit (HP reduced), deal damagePerCharge × your Charge as damage to the attacker.

name: Double Strike
description: Attacks twice per turn.

name: Enrage
description: Gains attack each time you take damage.

name: Ethereal Barrier
description: The first hit taken is fully negated.

name: Fiery
description: Gains attack each turn end but loses HP.

name: Fortify
description: Gain +N armor at end of each turn you were hit (HP reduced).

name: Frenzy
description: When HP first drops below 50% of max, permanently attack twice per turn.

name: Heroic
description: Gains attack equal to damage dealt (after armor).

name: Intoxicated
description: Gain +N attack while your Poison value is N or higher (threshold and bonus are both N).

name: Last Stand
description: One-time — when HP first drops below 25% of max, permanently gain +N attack.

name: Momentum
description: Spend N Charge to gain one additional attack this turn.

name: Overload
description: When Charge reaches 10, deal N damage to enemy, skip their next counter-attack, reset Charge.

name: Pierce
description: Ignores N armor per hit and erodes enemy Barrier N extra per hit.

name: Predator
description: Gain +N attack while your HP is greater than the enemy's HP.

name: Purge
description: Each turn end, converts up to N Poison from self into Barrier (1 Barrier per point removed). Fires before Poison tick.

name: Regeneration
description: Heals HP at the end of each turn survived.

name: Siphon
description: On hit (HP reduced), steal N Charge from enemy.

name: Sunder
description: Each hit permanently reduces enemy armor by N.

name: Supercharged
description: Gain +N attack while your Charge is N or higher.

name: Thorn
description: Reflects damage on each hit taken.

name: Vampirism
description: Heals a fraction of damage dealt (after armor).

name: Venom
description: Each hit applies N Poison to the enemy (bypasses armor/barrier at tick time).

name: Weaken
description: Each hit permanently reduces enemy attack by N.

name: Wither
description: Each hit permanently reduces enemy max HP by N (current HP also drops to match if needed).
